description: This file contains the SupportingDocumentService class, which implements business logic related to supporting document management in a Spring Boot application. It handles uploading, listing, updating metadata, downloading, and deleting supporting documents, including validation, storage, and database operations.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentService
classes.description: Service class providing business logic for managing supporting documents, including validation, storage, and metadata handling.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Handles uploading a new supporting document, validating inputs, calculating checksum, and persisting metadata.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists documents for a specific user, optionally filtered by loan draft ID.

methods.name: updateMetadata
methods.description: Updates the metadata JSON for an existing owned document.

methods.name: getDownload
methods.description: Prepares a resource for downloading a document if owned by the user.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a document's metadata and stored bytes if owned by the user.
